ptb_ppl.source: custom sliding-window perplexity, PTB test set from github.com/wojzaremba/lstm

lambada_ppl.source: custom perplexity on last word, LAMBADA test set from HuggingFace

lambada_acc.source: accuracy on last word prediction, LAMBADA test set

hellaswag_acc.source: 4-way completion scoring, HellaSwag validation set. GPT-2 reference from Zellers et al. 2019 (not on OpenAI model card)

cbt_cn_acc.source: 10-way cloze scoring, CBT Common Nouns test set

cbt_ne_acc.source: 10-way cloze scoring, CBT Named Entities test set

enwiki8_bpb.source: bits per byte on enwiki8 test split (last 5M chars)

text8_bpc.source: bits per character on text8 test split (last 5M chars)

final_topology.notes: At checkpoint iter 49500, 8/12 layers have hard density 1.0 (layers 5-12). Layers 1-4 have 0% hard density in the eval_genome.json (taken at iter 20K). At iter 49500+, layers 1-4 had begun waking up but checkpoint was saved at best val loss.

steps: 2. Install dependencies: pip install torch tiktoken datasets
5. Initialize model: GrownGPT2(genome, vocab_size=50257, hidden=768, ff_dim=3072, n_layers=12, n_heads=12, max_len=1024)
6. Load state dicts (strip '_orig_mod.' prefix from model state keys)
8. Run eval scripts from experiments/ directory
eval_scripts: experiments/eval_full_benchmark.py - Main benchmark suite (WikiText, LAMBADA, HellaSwag, enwiki8, text8)
